heading: Vector Embeddings
body:
The vector embeddings in the `sample_mflix.embedded_movies` collection
and in the example query were created using the Voyage AI `voyage-3-large`
embedding model. Your embedding model choice informs the vector dimensions
and vector similarity function you use in your vector search index. You can
use any [embedding model](avs-key-concepts) you like, and
experiment with different models as accuracy can vary between models
depending on your specific use case.

To learn how to create vector embeddings of your own data, see
[How to Create Vector Embeddings Manually](create-vector-embeddings).
